title: Venuscello® 100 x White Paper Plates 6" (15cm) Disposable Bagasse Dishes for Hot & Cold Food Ideal for Kids Parties Wedding Baby Shower Catering
features: Practical Pack: Each pack includes 100 6-inch white paper plates, ensuring you have the perfect number for your event or occasion.
Compact Size: These plates measure 6 inches in diameter, making them ideal for serving small appetizers, desserts, snacks, and petite portions.
Sturdy Construction: Crafted from high-quality paperboard, these plates are designed to be sturdy and dependable, able to hold a variety of foods without bending or leaking.
Disposable Convenience: Enjoy the convenience of disposable plates - no need to worry about washing dishes after your event. Simply dispose of them for quick and easy cleanup.
Versatile Use: The classic white color of these plates complements any table setting, making them suitable for a wide range of occasions, from casual family dinners to formal events.
